creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Here's the bug I was trying to find with bug 191931 with ttyname_r (it always assumes that isatty failing means ENOTTY):

 66         /* Must be a terminal. */
 67         if (!isatty(fd))
 68                 return (ENOTTY);

It's always assuming that isatty failing means ENOTTY:

# truss ./t_ttyname ttyname_r_err
